prediction.reasoning: ABT (Abbott Laboratories) is a large-cap healthcare stock with relatively stable fundamentals. Using historical volatility analysis, ABT typically exhibits annualized volatility around 20-25%. For an 18-day horizon, this translates to expected price movements of roughly ±2-3% for 50% confidence, ±5-6% for 80% confidence, and ±7-8% for 90% confidence intervals. The point estimate assumes no directional bias given the short timeframe. Healthcare stocks like ABT tend to have lower volatility than broader market indices, supporting these relatively narrow confidence bands.
